creator: ebs15242@gmail.com
text:
Why is this not a bug?  This happens for me when I compile R with OPENBLAS and GFORTRAN.  It would not let me make with OPENBLAS and FLANG.  So anyone using OPENBLAS is going to run into the problem. 

It's an easy fix:
cp work/R-3.4.2/lib/libRlapack.so /usr/local/lib/R/lib/
